name: Forearm Hypertrophy
description: Jeff Nippard's Forearm Hypertrophy Program - 8 weeks, 2 blocks, 3 days per week focusing on strength, hypertrophy, and metabolic stress

exercises.name: Heavy Barbell Holds
exercises.notes: Hold 20 sec. Choose heavy weight that nearly fails at time given, use chalk if needed

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench-Braced Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: Use thumbless grip. Allow dumbbell to 'roll' out into fingers and curl it back

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Wrist Extension
exercises.notes: Hold dumbbells at sides, and rotate the wrists 'out', avoid momentum

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Barbell Curl
exercises.notes: Use thumbless grip. Do 10 full ROM, 5 top half ROM to finish each set

exercises.name: Behind-the-Back Dumbbell Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: Place barbell behind your back and perform curls with the palms facing behind you

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench-Braced Wrist Extension
exercises.notes: Use thumbless grip. Short range of motion, mind muscle connection with posterior forearm

exercises.name: Plate Pinch
exercises.notes: Pinch 1-2 10 lb plates for as long as possible for a max hold of up to 1 minute, add a 3rd plate once 1 minute is reached with 2

exercises.name: Farmer's Walks
exercises.notes: Hold 1 heavy dumbbell in each hand and perform max strides until grip fails (increase weight by 40-50 total strides)

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench-Braced Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: Use thumbless grip. Allow dumbbell to 'roll' out into fingers and curl it back

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Peacher EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Use thumbless grip. Rest back of arms on preacher machine
